# PoOoOoOokkErrRr
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=PoOoOoOokkErrRr&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = PoOoOoOokkErrRr
| desc = 01001110 01101001 01100011 01100101 00100001
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| slot = dagger

| minDmg = 160
| maxDmg = 235
| shots = 1
| rof = 120
| range = no
| projSpeed = 18
| lifetime = 249
| fameb = 7

| legendary = 3

| bonuses = {{Stat|dex|5}}

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Pokerface]].
|range2 = 6.5|effects = yes|multihit = yes}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
[[Category: Daggers]]
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]
</noinclude>
